title: Section 133
content: If any person intentionally obstructs any officer of customs in the exercise of any powers conferred under this Act, such person shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to 1[two years], or with fine, or with both.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 31, ibid., for "six months" (w.e.f. 13-7-2006).
